audience: Contractors, renovation firms, installers and construction marketing teams documenting completed work
primaryDutchSearchIntent: Aannemers helpen realisatiefotografie plannen als bruikbaar bewijs van context, oplossing en vakmanschap

searchIntent.question: How should a contractor plan project photography that proves workmanship and supports a strong case study?
searchIntent.geographicContext: Construction and renovation projects in Belgium

directAnswer: Plan project photography before irreversible work disappears or the finished space enters daily use. Define the intended channels, photograph context, solution and workmanship, and agree site access, privacy, selection, formats and usage rights in advance.
title: Project photography for contractors: from construction site to strong case study
metaDescription: Plan project photography for contractors around project phases, a practical shot list, site safety, light, privacy, selection, usage rights and accessible publishing.
h1: Project photography for contractors: from construction site to strong case study
factsToPreserve: Site management determines safe access, zones and timing
The guide is not legal advice
Receiving photo files does not automatically transfer all copyright
Recognisable people require appropriate information and agreements
There is no ideal fixed number of images for a case study
